question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/controller/HooksController.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged external user supply a `timestamp=eq:<consensus_timestamp>` parameter to `GET /api/v1/accounts/{ownerId}/hooks/{hookId}/storage` to reconstruct the exact historical state of hook storage at any past Hashgraph consensus point, effectively reading tampered or overwritten history that should be opaque to external users?
